14 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArcGeoSim.h"
17 
18 BEGIN_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
19 
20 // TODO : faire un test unitaire pour cette classe
21 
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 
25 class ParallelUtils
26 {
30 public:
31 
33  ParallelUtils(Arcane::IParallelMng* parallel_mng)
34  : m_parallel_mng(parallel_mng){}
35 
37  virtual ~ParallelUtils() {}
38 
39 public:
40 
41  Arcane::IParallelMng* parallelMng() {return m_parallel_mng;}
42 
44  bool collectiveOr(const bool value);
45 
47  bool collectiveOrder(const bool value, const Arcane::Integer master);
48 
50  template<typename T>
51  inline void multiBroadcast(Arcane::Array<T> & v,const Arcane::Integer master_id);
52 
54  Arcane::Integer masterId() const { return m_parallel_mng->masterIORank();}
55 
57  bool isMaster() {return (m_parallel_mng->commRank() == masterId());}
58 
59 private:
60  Arcane::IParallelMng* m_parallel_mng;
61 };
62 
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
65 // Template implementation
66 
67 template<typename T>
68 void
69 ArcGeoSim::ParallelUtils::
70 multiBroadcast(Arcane::Array<T> & v,const Arcane::Integer master_id)
71 {
72  const Arcane::Integer byte_packet_size = 1000000;
73  const Arcane::Integer packet_size = byte_packet_size / sizeof(T);
74 
75  Arcane::Integer full_size = v.size();
76  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(IntegerArrayView(1,&full_size),master_id);
77  v.resize(full_size);
78 
79  Arcane::Integer phase_count = 0;
80  phase_count = full_size / packet_size;
81  if (full_size % packet_size != 0) ++phase_count;
82 
83  for(Arcane::Integer i_phase=0;i_phase<phase_count;++i_phase)
84  {
85  Arcane::Integer lower_bound = packet_size*i_phase;
86  Arcane::Integer this_packet_size = Arcane::math::min(packet_size,full_size-lower_bound);
87  Arcane::ArrayView<T> packet_view = v.view().subView(lower_bound,this_packet_size);
88  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(packet_view, master_id);
89  }
90 }
91 
92 
93 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
94 
95 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_UTILS_PARALLELUTILS_H */

ParallelUtils::multiBroadcast
void multiBroadcast(Arcane::Array< T > &v, const Arcane::Integer master_id)
Operation de broadcast : la methode decoupe v en tableau de 1000 octets.

bool collectiveOr(const bool value)
Operateur logique Ou parallele. Renseigne si la valeur du booleen est vrai sur au moins un processus.
